summary: Comprehensive testing of FREMAX admin enhancement features completed successfully. All admin product detail page functionality, 5-tab structure, and bulk import capabilities working perfectly.
passed_tests: Admin login working with admin/admin123 credentials
Admin dashboard loads and displays products list with clickable links
Clicking product row successfully opens admin product detail page
Product detail page has required 5-tab structure: General, Specs, Applications, Cross Ref, Logistics
All tabs are clickable and functional
Specs tab displays measurement fields based on product line (disc/drum/pad/shoe/caliper)
Applications tab has add/remove functionality for vehicle applications
Cross References tab has add/remove functionality for competitor codes
Logistics tab contains weight_kg, gross_weight_kg, vpe, ean_code fields
Bulk Import page accessible and loads correctly
Bulk Import page has 5 separate import tabs: Products, Applications, Cross References, Measurements, Logistics
Template download buttons present and clickable on all bulk import tabs
All backend API endpoints for admin enhancement working (16/16 tests passed)
Admin authentication and authorization working correctly
Product CRUD operations via admin APIs working
Product-specific data endpoints (applications, cross references, measurements, logistics) working
All 5 bulk import endpoints responding correctly
